name: Spaghetti Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cans RÔTEL Tomato with Green Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the chicken in seasoned water and save the broth.
2. Remove the chicken from the bones.
3. Cook the spaghetti in the broth.
4. Grate the cheese and add it to the hot spaghetti.
5. Cook the green pepper and onion in margarine and add them to the spaghetti mixture.
6. Add RÔTEL tomatoes with green chilies, peas, and chicken to the mixture.
7. Mix well and pour into a greased casserole dish.
8. Bake at 350 degrees until blended through. This recipe freezes well.
